Event: Magic Training - Cosmodusa
Event Date: 23/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM203
Cosmodusa Tamer Amulet

Once in a while the amulet owner removes all negative effects from themselves and becomes immune to them for 5 sec. If the amulet owner is dead when the ability is triggered, the amulet will revive them with 50% health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
